title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Wind Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...South winds 25 to 35 mph with gusts up to 60 mph possible.

* WHERE...Eastern Alaska Range North of Trims Camp.

* WHEN...From 4 AM Sunday to 10 PM AKDT Monday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects. Tree
limbs could be blown down and a few power outages may result.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Periods of blowing snow may develop where

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: Winter Storm Watch
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and Blowing Snow possible. Total snow accumulations
between 2 and 5 inches possible. Winds may gust as high as 40 mph.

* WHERE...Dalton Highway Summits.

* WHEN...From Sunday morning through Monday morning.

* IMPACTS...Visibilities may drop below 1/4 mile due to falling and
blowing snow. Travel may be impacted.
Monitor the latest forecasts for updates on this situation.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: Winter Storm Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow expected. Total snow accumulations
between 3 and 7 inches. Winds gusting as high as 45 mph.

* WHERE...Yukon Delta Coast.

* WHEN...From 10 AM Saturday to 10 AM AKDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Visibilities may drop below 1/4 mile due to falling and
blowing snow. Travel could be very difficult. Areas of blowing
snow could significantly reduce visibility.
